name: Brandy Peaches Parfait
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Frozen Peaches, OR 1 cup Fresh Peaches, Peeled
recipeInstructions:
1. Partly thaw the frozen peaches and cut into small pieces.
2. Soak the peach pieces overnight in the juice, adding the bitters and brandy. Keep fresh peaches immersed or covered to prevent darkening.
3. Partially thaw the orange sherbet.
4. Mix the sherbet with the soaked peach pieces.
5. Spoon the mixture into parfait glasses.
6. Freeze for two to three hours.
NOTE: To serve with Oriental food, mince 1 teaspoon crystallized ginger and add to the peaches.
